reasoning: For 2025-11-16, the FIDE list is updated monthly on the 1st of the month. Thus, Wikipedia's FIDE rankings page on 2025-11-09 will almost certainly display the November FIDE list, and on 2025-11-16 it will display the exact same November FIDE list. Since "as high or higher" includes equality (i.e. remaining at the exact same rank), this will almost certainly resolve to YES for the first date. For the later dates (2025-12-09 and 2026-02-07), new monthly FIDE lists (December and February) will be in effect. Since "as high or higher" means ranking equal to or closer to #1 (a mathematically lower rank number but a "higher" rank), the probability depends on whether she improves/stalls versus declines. Given that retaining the precise same rank counts as a YES, the probability starts slightly above 50% for December and gradually decays towards 50% for February as more time passes on the FIDE rating updates, with perhaps a very slight downward structural drift as she faces younger improving players.
